verdicts.expected: Small magenta S-52/S-101 anchorage/obstruction anchor motif: magenta vertical shank, crossbar, and compact flukes; preserve magenta hazard/area styling.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic anchor is present, but colour and scale are wrong versus S-101/OpenCPN. Aqua Map anchoring-prohibited is not the right primary reference for this row.
verdicts.observed: Black large anchor with circular ring and rounded flukes.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw from S-101/OpenCPN ACHARE02: compact magenta anchor, no black stroke, correct tiny-chart proportions.

verdicts.expected: Boundary anchorage area symbol is a pale/magenta S-52 anchor/boundary reference, larger than ACHARE02 but still magenta and shaped like S-101 ACHARE51.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate reuses the wrong black point-anchor and ignores the ACHARE51 S-101/OpenCPN boundary form.
verdicts.observed: Same black large anchor reused from ACHARE02.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw ACHARE51 specifically from S-101/OpenCPN, preserving magenta boundary colour and the broader anchor outline.

verdicts.expected: Designated anchor berth reference uses a compact magenta anchor with circular berth ring and crossbar details.
verdicts.judge_comments: The berth ring detail exists in the source but the candidate is black, oversized, and not the S-101 berth silhouette.
verdicts.observed: Same black generic anchor reused.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as ACHBRT07: magenta compact anchor with circular berth ring and reference-matched proportions.

verdicts.expected: OpenCPN/S-52 anchor-point symbol is compact light-magenta/purple anchor, not black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic anchor is plausible but not colour-safe or chart-standard for this row.
verdicts.observed: Black anchor with large ring and heavy stroke.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw ACHPNT01 as compact magenta/purple anchor point; keep it visually distinct from anchorage area variants.

verdicts.expected: S-101/OpenCPN ACHRES61 shows a magenta anchorage-restriction symbol with diagonal prohibition slash plus caution/other-caution mark.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate omits the restriction semantics entirely; this is a navigation-safety failure.
verdicts.observed: Plain black anchor only; no prohibition slash/caution modifier.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw with magenta anchor, diagonal restriction slash, and ACHRES61 caution modifier exactly as S-101/OpenCPN shows.

verdicts.expected: S-101/OpenCPN ACHRES71 shows magenta anchorage restriction with diagonal slash and information marker.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate collapses restricted anchoring into ordinary anchoring, which is unsafe.
verdicts.observed: Plain black anchor only; no information/restriction modifier.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw with magenta anchor, diagonal restriction slash, and ACHRES71 information marker from S-101/OpenCPN.

verdicts.expected: OpenCPN ADDMRK01 is a small right-facing additional-mark triangle/board element, not a diamond hazard marker.
verdicts.judge_comments: Generic placeholder; no match to direction or board geometry.
verdicts.observed: Black diamond with white center dot.
verdicts.required_change: Replace with right-facing triangular additional mark matching OpenCPN ADDMRK01 proportions and light fill/black edge.

verdicts.expected: OpenCPN ADDMRK02 is the left-facing additional-mark triangle/board element.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate does not encode left direction and duplicates ADDMRK01.
verdicts.observed: Black diamond with white center dot, identical to ADDMRK01.
verdicts.required_change: Replace with left-facing triangular additional mark matching OpenCPN ADDMRK02.

verdicts.expected: OpenCPN ADDMRK05 is a horizontal/bottom board element.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate is unrelated to a bottom board mark.
verdicts.observed: Black diamond with white center dot, identical to ADDMRK01/02.
verdicts.required_change: Replace with horizontal bottom board/plate mark matching OpenCPN ADDMRK05.

verdicts.expected: S-101/OpenCPN airport area pattern is a brown/land-colour circle containing an airplane silhouette.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate is explicitly a placeholder and misses the aircraft silhouette.
verdicts.observed: Dashed square with grey plus/cross placeholder.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw AIRARE02 as circular land-colour airport symbol with centered aircraft silhouette from S-101/OpenCPN.

verdicts.expected: OpenCPN AISDEF01 is a green AIS target shape with unknown heading/course/question-mark styling.
verdicts.judge_comments: Wrong colour family and wrong AIS target geometry; could be confused with generic hazard/notice mark.
verdicts.observed: Large magenta diamond with white center dot.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as AISDEF01 from OpenCPN: green AIS target glyph with unknown-heading/question indication.

verdicts.expected: OpenCPN AISONE01 is a small green one-minute vector tick/mark.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate is unrelated to vector time marks.
verdicts.observed: Large black diamond with white center dot.
verdicts.required_change: Replace with small green one-minute AIS vector mark matching OpenCPN.

verdicts.expected: OpenCPN AISSIX01 is a small green six-minute AIS vector mark, visually distinct from AISONE01.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate is unrelated and duplicates the one-minute candidate.
verdicts.observed: Large black diamond with white center dot.
verdicts.required_change: Replace with small green six-minute AIS vector mark matching OpenCPN and distinct from AISONE01.

verdicts.expected: OpenCPN AISSLP01 is a green sleeping AIS target glyph.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate gives no sleeping/target semantics and uses wrong colour.
verdicts.observed: Large black diamond with white center dot.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as green sleeping AIS target matching OpenCPN silhouette.

verdicts.expected: OpenCPN AISVES01 is a green active AIS vessel target with vector/heading line semantics.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate omits vessel target and vector/heading semantics.
verdicts.observed: Large black diamond with white center dot.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as green active AIS vessel target with heading/vector shape from OpenCPN.

verdicts.expected: OpenCPN ARPATG01 is a green ARPA target marker/circle/target glyph.
verdicts.judge_comments: Generic diamond does not match radar target symbology.
verdicts.observed: Large black diamond with white center dot.
verdicts.required_change: Replace with OpenCPN ARPA target silhouette in the correct green target style.

verdicts.expected: OpenCPN ARPONE01 is a tiny green one-minute ARPA vector tick/line.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate is unrelated and too large.
verdicts.observed: Large black diamond with white center dot.
verdicts.required_change: Replace with small green one-minute ARPA vector tick matching OpenCPN.

verdicts.expected: OpenCPN ARPSIX01 is a tiny green six-minute ARPA vector tick/line.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate is unrelated and duplicates ARPONE01.
verdicts.observed: Large black diamond with white center dot.
verdicts.required_change: Replace with small green six-minute ARPA vector tick matching OpenCPN and distinct from ARPONE01.

verdicts.expected: North cardinal topmark: two cones/triangles points up; yellow fill with black outline in references.
verdicts.judge_comments: Orientation and semantic topmark are correct. Stroke/scale should be normalized later, but this is not a wrong-quadrant hazard.
verdicts.observed: Two yellow triangles both pointing up, black outline, Helm stroke heavier/larger than source.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional style pass can reduce stroke/scale to match S-101/OpenCPN proportions.

verdicts.expected: East cardinal topmark: two cones points away from each other.
verdicts.judge_comments: Orientation is correct and matches S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map. Style can be tightened later.
verdicts.observed: Two yellow triangles pointing away from each other; black outline, Helm stroke heavier/larger than source.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional style pass can reduce stroke/scale.

verdicts.expected: South cardinal topmark: two cones/triangles points down.
verdicts.judge_comments: Correct quadrant/topmark orientation; passes safety semantics.
verdicts.observed: Two yellow triangles both pointing down; black outline, Helm stroke heavier/larger than source.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional style pass can reduce stroke/scale.

verdicts.expected: West cardinal topmark: two cones points toward each other.
verdicts.judge_comments: Correct quadrant/topmark orientation; passes safety semantics.
verdicts.observed: Two yellow triangles pointing toward each other; black outline, Helm stroke heavier/larger than source.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional style pass can reduce stroke/scale.

verdicts.expected: BCNCON81 must be verified against its exact OpenCPN/S-52 reference before approval; packet metadata says BCNSPP/BOYSHP conditions, not enough to approve a buoy-body drawing.
verdicts.judge_comments: No local reference render was available and the candidate may be using a buoy body for a beacon symbol. Conservative fail.
verdicts.observed: Large conical buoy body filled blue/red/white stripes; no local OpenCPN reference render found.
verdicts.required_change: Regenerate source reference for BCNCON81, then redraw exactly to the reference; do not approve from inferred metadata alone.

verdicts.expected: S-101/OpenCPN default beacon is a small gray rectangular beacon/unknown marker with magenta question mark, not a large striped body.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate shape, scale, and colour bands do not match the default beacon reference.
verdicts.observed: Large tapered beacon body with black/magenta/gray horizontal fills.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw BCNDEF13 from S-101/OpenCPN: compact default beacon rectangle plus magenta question mark/unknown styling.

verdicts.expected: S-101/OpenCPN beacon general full-chart is a small black post with circle/base marks, not a coloured body.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate invents colour bands and body shape absent from the reference.
verdicts.observed: Large tapered beacon body filled black/blue with stem.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as compact black general beacon post/circle silhouette from S-101/OpenCPN.

verdicts.expected: S-101/OpenCPN paper-chart beacon default is a compact black beacon/post plus magenta question mark/unknown marker.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate misses the question-mark/default-paper beacon form and uses an unrelated filled tower.
verdicts.observed: Large tapered beacon body filled black/magenta.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw BCNGEN03 from S-101/OpenCPN: compact beacon/post with magenta question mark marker.

verdicts.expected: OpenCPN white beacon general is a small compact beacon/post symbol with white/outlined colour semantics.
verdicts.judge_comments: Colour is plausible but silhouette/scale is not the OpenCPN chart-standard mark.
verdicts.observed: Large white tapered beacon body with black outline and stem.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as compact OpenCPN BCNGEN05 beacon/post, preserving white colour semantics without oversized tower body.

verdicts.expected: OpenCPN red beacon general is a small compact beacon/post symbol with red colour cue.
verdicts.judge_comments: Colour family is plausible, but the candidate uses wrong silhouette and scale.
verdicts.observed: Large red tapered beacon body with black outline and stem.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as compact OpenCPN BCNGEN60 beacon/post with red cue.

verdicts.expected: OpenCPN green beacon general is a small compact beacon/post symbol with green colour cue.
verdicts.judge_comments: Colour family is plausible, but the silhouette and scale are not the reference.
verdicts.observed: Large green tapered beacon body with black outline and stem.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as compact OpenCPN BCNGEN61 beacon/post with green cue.

verdicts.expected: OpenCPN red/white beacon general is a small compact beacon/post symbol with red/white cue.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate is an oversized body rendering and does not match the chart-standard compact mark.
verdicts.observed: Large red-over-white tapered beacon body with black outline and stem.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as compact OpenCPN BCNGEN64 beacon/post with red/white cue; avoid buoy/tower body unless the exact reference shows it.
